Website Terms and Conditions

Website Terms and Conditions

.has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”] { padding-bottom: var(—divider-height); z-index: var(—z-index); } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”] .background-pause-button { bottom: calc(14px + var(—divider-height)); } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”] .section-divider-svg-clip { display: none; } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”].background-width—inset:not(.content-collection):not(.gallery-section):not(.user-items-list-section) { padding-bottom: calc(var(—sqs-site-gutter) + var(—divider-height)); } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”].background-width—inset:not(.content-collection):not(.gallery-section):not(.user-items-list-section) .section-background { bottom: calc(var(—sqs-site-gutter) + var(—divider-height)); } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”] .section-divider-block { height: var(—divider-height); } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”] { padding-bottom: 2vw; } .has-section-divider[data-section-id=“6837f31f80fdd439356f2b89”].background-width—inset:not(.content-collection):not(.gallery-section):not(.user-items-list-section) { padding-bottom: calc(var(—sqs-site-gutter) + 2vw); }

Website Terms and Conditions

Effective Date: 29 May 2025
Website: www.motelcoach.com
Business Name: Motel Coach

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not use this website.

2. Website Content

All content provided on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, videos, courses, and downloadable materials, is for general information and educational purposes only.

Motel Coach reserves the right to change or update content without notice.

3. Intellectual Property

All intellectual property on this website, including trademarks, branding, logos, course materials, and other content, is owned by or licensed to Motel Coach.

You may not reproduce, redistribute, or commercially exploit any content without our express written permission.

4. Use of Website

You agree not to use this website:

  • For any unlawful purpose

  • To infringe on the rights of others

  • To post or transmit harmful or offensive content

  • To attempt to hack or interfere with our platform’s functionality

We may suspend or terminate your access to the site if we believe you are in breach of these terms.

5. Learning Platform and Email Signup

When signing up for access to our learning platform or subscribing to emails, you agree to provide accurate and complete information.

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, and for all activities that occur under your account.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Motel Coach disclaims all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of this website, or reliance on its content.

The website and all content are provided “as is” without warranties of any kind.

7. Third-Party Links

This website may contain links to third-party websites. Motel Coach is not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those websites and recommends you review their terms before engaging with them.

8. Termination and Suspension

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to our website or services at any time, without prior notice, for conduct that we reasonably believe violates these Terms & Conditions or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.

9. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms & Conditions from time to time. Changes take effect when posted on this page. We recommend reviewing them periodically.

10. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of Queensland, Australia. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Queensland.

11. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at:

Email: contact@motelcoach.com

Improve your Motel's Profitability.

Book a Strategic Audit

Motel Coach

Operational engineering for independent Australian motels. Moving owners from reactive management to systems-based profitability.
